name: block_fetch_mid_batch_disconnect
description: Server sends StartBatch then two blocks then drops the connection without BatchDone. Block-Fetch spec §5.2 requires the server to send BatchDone to close a batch cleanly; omitting it is a protocol violation. Tests whether the client detects a mid-stream connection drop and surfaces an error rather than hanging. Uses send_sequence so all four sends fire for a single RequestRange without returning to the receive loop.
